title: Fresh Monsoon Garlic Stir-fry
description: A quick and easy dish featuring fresh garlic powder to mimic the taste of monsoons in a tender, flavorful stir-fry that's perfect for any meal.

ingredients.name: 1 cup of mixed vegetables (e.g., bell peppers, onions)

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add mixed vegetables and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes or until vegetables are tender-crisp.
Pour in soy sauce and lime juice. Stir well to combine.
Serve hot as a side dish.
